title: fragariastrum doddsii
intro: Fragariastrum doddsii, also known as Dodds' strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a perennial plant that bears small white flowers and edible strawberries, similar to the common strawberry. The medicinal properties of Fragariastrum doddsii include its high antioxidant content, which may help protect against cell damage and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Dodds' strawberry, such as infusions and tinctures, may be used to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and promote digestive well-being.
